title: Add minimal runtime write path for .aof/tasks and .aof/goals
description: The v1.8 docs and schemas define AOF-native task memory and goal projection, but the current runtime does not yet provide a canonical write path for these structures in the AOF repo itself.
triage_notes: AOF-on-AOF simulation confirmed this remains the highest-impact open gap: the repo now has canonical task and goal files, but runtime still cannot update them through a minimal write path.
